com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class Convert

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert

  • public class Convert
extends java.lang.Object
    Converts from proto objects to server POJOs
    Since:
    TTworkbench 18
